evals.prompt: Here's the hero copy for a SaaS landing page. Make it sound human, not AI-generated: 'Our cutting-edge platform seamlessly empowers teams to unlock their full potential. Not just a tool, but a revolutionary solution designed to streamline your workflow and elevate productivity to new heights.'
evals.expected_output: Tightened, concrete rewrite: slop vocab (cutting-edge, seamlessly, empowers, unlock, revolutionary, streamline, elevate) removed, 'not just X but Y' gone, shorter, names the real benefit. Flags/asks for brand voice if unknown.

evals.prompt: Clean up this Spanish marketing paragraph so it doesn't read like a machine wrote it: 'En el mundo actual, nuestra potente solucion no solo optimiza tus procesos empresariales, sino que tambien revoluciona por completo la manera en que gestionas tu negocio del dia a dia.'
evals.expected_output: Native Spanish de-slop: 'En el mundo actual', 'potente solucion', 'no solo... sino que tambien', 'revoluciona' removed; concrete verbs and nouns; shorter. Not a translation of an English fix.

evals.prompt: This button + subtext feels generic, punch it up but keep it honest: 'Effortlessly begin your journey to success today with our powerful all-in-one solution.'
evals.expected_output: Microcopy de-slop: concrete action verb, no 'effortlessly/journey/powerful/solution', short, same CTA intent.
